title: Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) Sampling Process
description: A flowchart depicting the iterative Metropolis-Hastings algorithm, a common MCMC method for sampling from a complex target distribution.
relationships: Start State generates a Proposed State using the Proposal Distribution
The algorithm evaluates the Proposed State against the current state using the Target Distribution
The Accept/Reject Step decides to keep the new state or the old one
The output becomes the new Start State for the next iteration
